resume.executive_summary: Sales Engineer / Solutions Architect with 15 years of operator experience selling and shipping B2B SaaS to enterprise buyers. Co-owned Hydrant — a software engineering firm — through to a successful 2025 exit, after personally leading pre-sales discovery and stakeholder demos for accounts including Cox Communications, Safeguard Global, and TitanX (Series A). Earlier, drove a Utah wireless ISP from $6M to $13M ARR as the technical credibility on seven-figure deals — culminating in a $27M Boston Omaha acquisition. MBA + PMP behind disciplined deal mechanics, plus the storytelling instinct to turn dense technical capability into a demo that closes. Comfortable in front of CTOs, IT directors, and procurement; equally comfortable building the demo myself when the SE team is heads-down.
top_bullets: Drove enterprise revenue from $6M to $13M ARR at Utah Broadband as the technical credibility on seven-figure circuit deployments for Fortune 500 clients — culminating in $27M acquisition by Boston Omaha (NASDAQ: BOMN)
Led pre-sales discovery and stakeholder demos for Cox Communications' True Local Labs as Hydrant's account lead — turned a concept into a $1M Year 1 revenue platform delivered 12 months ahead of plan
Served as fractional COO for TitanX, designing the GTM motion, demo environment, and deal qualification framework that enabled $27M Series A in under 24 months

Currently lead enterprise discovery and technical scoping at CA Engineering for IoT and wireless deals across aerospace, industrial, and Fortune 500 energy clients — translate prospect business problems into solution architectures and demos that close
skills_gap: Legal-tech / case management software (JD: 'plus but not necessary')
AI/LLM product hands-on (worth a 1-week prep before final round)
resume.cover_letter_hook: Filevine's pitch — turn legal operations from reactive to proactive — is exactly what I did at Hydrant for sales operations, customer success, and compliance teams across dozens of B2B engagements. I'm at home in the moment when a prospect says 'show me how this would work for my firm' and you have to compose a credible answer live. I'm a short drive from your SLC office and would be in-person five days a week from day one.
